description: Comprehensive backend test suite covering models, serializers, balance logic, and all API endpoints

userStories.title: Create test fixtures
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared test fixtures so all tests use consistent, realistic data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/fixtures/test_data.json with: 2 users (1 staff 'admin', 1 regular 'alice'), 1 currency (USD), 1 category (Food), 1 group type (Home), 1 group with both users as members
Fixture loads successfully via: cd backend && python manage.py loaddata test_data
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Fixture: 2 users (admin/alice), USD currency, Food category, Home group type, 1 group with both members. Password: password123

userStories.title: Model unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for all models so field constraints, managers, and methods are verified.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/__init__.py and backend/core/tests/test_models.py
Test User creation with display_name field
Test Category, GroupType, Currency __str__ methods return expected strings
Test Group creation with members M2M and default_split_method
Test ExpenseManager excludes soft-deleted expenses (Expense.objects vs Expense.all_objects)
Test ApiKey.generate_key() returns a 64-character hex string
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_models

userStories.title: Serializer unit tests — equal and custom splits
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for ExpenseSerializer split logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_serializers.py
Test ExpenseSerializer creates equal splits across group members when split_data omitted
Test ExpenseSerializer creates custom splits when split_data is provided
Test ExpenseSerializer rejects split_data where amounts don't sum to expense total
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_serializers
userStories.notes: 3 tests: equal split, custom split, invalid split rejection

userStories.title: Serializer unit tests — admin user and group serializers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for AdminUserSerializer password hashing and GroupSerializer computed fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Test AdminUserSerializer create hashes password (check_password returns True, raw password not stored)
Test AdminUserSerializer update with new password hashes it
Test GroupSerializer returns correct member_count and member_ids
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_serializers
userStories.notes: 3 tests: AdminUserSerializer create/update password hashing, GroupSerializer member_count/member_ids

userStories.title: Balance computation unit tests — basic cases
userStories.description: As a developer, I want thorough tests for _compute_balances() simple scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_balances.py
Test: 1 expense, 2 members, equal split — verify payer is owed half by the other member
Test: no expenses or settlements returns empty balances
Test: expense with created_by=None is skipped (no error, empty balances)
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_balances

userStories.title: Balance computation unit tests — settlements and multi-member
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for settlement offsets and 3+ member scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: settlement partially reduces a debt (net balance decreases but not zero)
Test: settlement fully zeros a debt between two members
Test: multiple expenses by different payers produce correct net balances
Test: 3 members with cross-debts simplify to minimal pairwise debts
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_balances
userStories.notes: 4 tests: partial settlement, full settlement, multiple payers, 3-member cross debts

userStories.title: Auth API tests — login and logout
userStories.description: As a developer, I want API tests for login, logout, and unauthenticated access.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_auth.py
POST /api/auth/login/ with valid credentials returns 200 and username
POST /api/auth/login/ with invalid credentials returns 401
POST /api/auth/logout/ returns 200
Unauthenticated GET /api/users/me/ returns 401 or 403
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_auth
userStories.notes: 4 tests: login valid, login invalid, logout, unauthenticated access

userStories.title: API key auth tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for API key CRUD and authentication via X-API-Key header.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/users/me/api-key/ creates key and returns it (201)
POST /api/users/me/api-key/ again replaces old key with new one
DELETE /api/users/me/api-key/ removes key (204)
DELETE /api/users/me/api-key/ with no key returns 404
Request with valid X-API-Key header authenticates successfully
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_auth
userStories.notes: 5 tests: create key, replace key, delete key, delete nonexistent, X-API-Key auth

userStories.title: AdminWritePermission API tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying read access for all auth users and write access for staff only.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_permissions.py
Non-staff GET /api/categories/ returns 200
Non-staff POST /api/categories/ returns 403
Staff POST /api/categories/ returns 201
Staff DELETE /api/categories/{id}/ returns 204
Non-staff POST /api/groups/ returns 403
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_permissions

userStories.title: User profile API tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for the /api/users/me/ endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_users.py
GET /api/users/me/ returns current user's data (username, display_name)
PATCH /api/users/me/ updates display_name
POST /api/users/me/avatar/ with no file returns 400
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_users
userStories.notes: 3 tests: GET me, PATCH display_name, avatar no file 400

userStories.title: Group CRUD and member management API tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for group creation, listing, and member add/remove.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_groups.py
Staff POST /api/groups/ creates group (201)
Non-staff GET /api/groups/ returns only groups they belong to
Staff GET /api/groups/ returns all groups
POST /api/groups/{id}/members/ with valid user_id adds member
POST /api/groups/{id}/members/ with non-existent user returns 404
DELETE /api/groups/{id}/members/{user_id}/ removes member (204)
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_groups
userStories.notes: 6 tests: staff create, non-staff filtered list, staff all list, add/remove member, nonexistent user 404

userStories.title: Expense CRUD API tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for creating, listing, updating, and soft-deleting expenses.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_expenses.py
POST /api/groups/{id}/expenses/ creates expense with equal splits (201)
POST /api/groups/{id}/expenses/ with split_data creates custom splits
GET /api/groups/{id}/expenses/ lists non-deleted expenses only
PATCH /api/expenses/{id}/ by creator updates expense
PATCH /api/expenses/{id}/ by non-creator returns 403
DELETE /api/expenses/{id}/ soft-deletes (is_deleted=True, returns 204)
Soft-deleted expense no longer appears in GET /api/groups/{id}/expenses/
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_expenses
userStories.notes: 7 tests: create equal/custom, list excludes deleted, PATCH creator/non-creator, DELETE soft-deletes

userStories.title: Settlement API tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for creating and listing settlements.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_settlements.py
POST /api/groups/{id}/settlements/ creates settlement with request.user as payer (201)
GET /api/groups/{id}/settlements/ lists settlements for the group
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_settlements

userStories.title: Balance API endpoint tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want API tests for balance endpoints to verify end-to-end correctness.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_balance_api.py
GET /api/groups/{id}/balances/ returns correct balances after expenses and settlements
GET /api/users/me/balances/ returns correct aggregate across user's groups
Empty group returns empty balances list
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_balance_api

userStories.title: Export API tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for CSV and JSON export endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/core/tests/test_exports.py
GET /api/groups/{id}/export/?format=csv returns text/csv with correct headers
GET /api/groups/{id}/export/?format=json returns application/json array
GET /api/groups/{id}/export/?format=xml returns 400
GET /api/users/me/export/?format=csv exports only current user's expenses
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core.tests.test_exports
